title: Fan frequency drop causes dryer temperature drift and coating non-uniformity
title_zh: 风机频率下降引发干燥温漂与涂布不均
station: dryer section airflow and temperature control
operator_note: Fan inverter showed intermittent low-frequency output after a power fluctuation. Zone 1 and zone 2 temperatures drifted slowly. Coating thickness appeared uneven at the 14:20 inspection.

expected_outputs.primary_root_cause: fan inverter cooling module degradation causing frequency instability
expected_outputs.secondary_root_cause: dryer temperature drift due to insufficient airflow
expected_outputs.business_risk: coating non-uniformity and potential batch rejection
